########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/AntiSpoof \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \

  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Babel \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CommunityConfiguration

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Disambiguator \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor

  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/Elastica

########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/ProofreadPage \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/BetaFeatures mediawiki/extensions/LabeledSectionTransclusion mediawiki/extensions/ParserFunctions mediawiki/extensions/Scribunto mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \

  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging
